cases.description: Must always ask the user to pick INLINE vs SUBAGENT mode before touching code
cases.prompt: execute the implementation plan we wrote
expectations: Does NOT start executing tasks immediately
Asks the user to choose INLINE (sequential, watch-along) or SUBAGENT (fresh subagent per task with two-stage review)
Waits for the user's explicit choice before proceeding
Does NOT default to one mode silently

cases.description: /codi-plan-execution slash activation also asks the mode question
expectations: Activates plan-execution skill
Reads the plan to confirm it exists
Asks INLINE vs SUBAGENT before starting any task

cases.description: INLINE mode: user picks inline — agent executes sequentially with checkpoints
cases.prompt: execute the plan inline, step by step
expectations: Loads the plan document completely
Creates a task list via TaskCreate
Executes each task precisely as written (no improvisation)
Applies codi-tdd for each implementation step
Applies codi-verification before marking each task complete
Does NOT dispatch subagents

cases.description: INLINE mode: resumes from the last incomplete task
cases.prompt: continue executing the plan inline from where we left off
expectations: Reads the plan to identify completed and pending tasks
Identifies the first incomplete task
Continues execution from that task
Does NOT restart from the beginning

cases.description: SUBAGENT mode: user picks subagent — dispatch per task with two-stage review
cases.prompt: run the plan with subagents — dispatch one per task with two-stage review
expectations: Extracts the specific task text for each subagent (no full plan access)
Dispatches implementer subagent with tdd + verification instructions
Waits for DONE / DONE_WITH_CONCERNS / NEEDS_CONTEXT / BLOCKED status
Runs spec compliance review BEFORE code quality review
Dispatches codi-code-reviewer agent for Step 5
Does NOT dispatch multiple implementer subagents in parallel

cases.description: SUBAGENT mode: multi-file tasks with coordination
cases.prompt: use subagents to implement the user management system per the plan
expectations: Asks the user to confirm SUBAGENT mode
Dispatches one subagent per task from the plan
Applies two-stage review per task before moving to the next
Runs codi-code-reviewer on the complete changeset after all tasks

cases.description: No approved plan should route to plan-writer, not activate plan-execution
cases.prompt: write a plan for implementing the notification system
expectations: Does NOT activate plan-execution skill
Routes to codi-plan-writer (and codi-brainstorming if no design spec yet)
Does NOT start executing tasks

cases.description: Trivial single-file edits should NOT trigger plan-execution
cases.prompt: add error handling to the payment service
expectations: Does NOT activate plan-execution skill
Edits directly without plan overhead
Does NOT ask INLINE vs SUBAGENT

cases.description: Bug investigation without a fix plan routes to debugging
cases.prompt: the payment webhook is failing — figure out why
expectations: Does NOT activate plan-execution skill
Routes to codi-debugging for root-cause work
Does NOT ask INLINE vs SUBAGENT

cases.description: Baseline failing tests must be fixed before execution
cases.prompt: execute the plan — note that some tests are already failing
expectations: Recognizes the baseline-on-red condition
Refuses to proceed until baseline is green
Recommends codi-debugging for the failing tests first
